methods.name: initialize
methods.desc: Set the Identity registry app id (0 keeps the owner guards on the local registry).

methods.name: setAgentOwner
methods.desc:
DEV/TEST seam (deferred identity): register an agent's owner locally so the
self-feedback prohibition can be exercised without the Identity app.

methods.name: giveFeedback
methods.desc:
giveFeedback (mapping §2.2 + §x402 Profile). Caller MUST NOT be the agent owner
(self-feedback prohibition) and MUST supply the x402 proof-of-payment that backs the
review: `paymentTxid` (the settlement txid) plus its `nonce`. Each settlement txid can
back exactly one feedback — reputation is earned per real, unique payment.

events.name: NewFeedback
events.desc:
ARC-28 event structs for the ERC-8004 Reputation & Validation registries.

EVM `indexed` topics have no AVM analog — ARC-28 emits the whole event as one log entry
and indexers filter on the decoded fields (mapping §2.3 / §5.1). So the `indexed` keyword
from the ERC is a no-op here; field order is preserved 1:1 with the spec.

methods.name: revokeFeedback
methods.desc: revokeFeedback (mapping §2.2). Caller MUST be the original client — enforced by the key.

methods.name: getSummary
methods.desc: getSummary (mapping §2.2). clientAddresses MUST be non-empty (Sybil guard).

identityAppId.desc: Identity app id; 0 = deferred (owner resolved from local registry).

lastIndex.desc: last feedbackIndex per (agentId, client). key = agentId(8) ++ client(32)

feedback.desc: feedback row. key = agentId(8) ++ client(32) ++ index(8)

clientList.desc: clients that have given feedback, per agent. key = agentId

respCount.desc: response count. key = agentId(8) ++ client(32) ++ index(8) ++ responder(32)

owners.desc: DEFERRED identity seam: local owner registry. key = agentId

usedPayment.desc: x402 proof-of-payment replay guard (ERC-8004 §x402): settlement txid → agentId it backed. key = paymentTxid(32)

sourceInfo.errorMessage: OnCompletion must be NoOp && can only call when creating
index access is out of bounds
invalid number of bytes for arc4.bool
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<arc4.uint8>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 16>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint8
